businessSummary.oneLiner: Government & enterprise AI data analytics platform — transforming from core US defense/intelligence partner to commercial AI powerhouse
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds software platforms that analyze and integrate complex data. Since AIP (AI Platform) launch, commercial segment has exploded. Q4 2025 revenue $1.407B (+70% YoY), US commercial revenue $507M (+137% YoY). Mar 3 close $147.23 (+1.42%). Outperformed market amid Iran-Israel military conflict as defense AI spending expectations strengthened. Forbes analyzed $350B market cap sustainability. P/E 229.41x, Forward P/E 78.45x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government Contracts: US DoD, CIA, NSA software licenses and maintenance
Commercial: AIP-based enterprise AI analytics subscriptions — US commercial +137% YoY
International Government: NATO allies and Five Eyes partner contracts
keyProducts: AIP (AI Platform): Connects LLMs to enterprise data for AI analytics
Gotham: Government/defense data analysis and decision support
Foundry: Enterprise data integration and analytics platform
Apollo: Software deployment and management automation
Maven: US DoD AI operations support system

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Elevated but reflects EPS surge (+232% YoY). Converging to Forward P/E 78.45x

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: FY2026 EPS $1.85 forecast. PEG 1.49 at 52.72% growth rate

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Best-in-class among SaaS companies. High operating leverage

keyMetrics.name: PEG
keyMetrics.interpretation: Fair valuation range given growth rate

growthDrivers.title: Iran-Israel Conflict → Defense AI Spending Acceleration
growthDrivers.description: Middle East military escalation expected to boost US/NATO defense AI budgets. Direct demand for Gotham/Maven.

growthDrivers.title: Forbes: $350B Market Cap Sustainable?
growthDrivers.description: Forbes analysis supports current valuation based on AI platform adoption speed and record contract bookings ($4.26B).

growthDrivers.title: 2026/2027 EPS Consensus Sharply Raised
growthDrivers.description: Consensus EPS significantly raised over past month. US commercial +137% growth is the key driver.

growthDrivers.title: AIP Commercial Adoption Accelerating
growthDrivers.description: AIP bootcamp conversion driving rapid enterprise customer expansion. Q4 US commercial $507M (+137% YoY).

competitiveAdvantage.summary: Government security clearances (Top Secret/SCI), 20-year defense/intelligence relationships, AIP enterprise AI platform expansion are core moats.

moats.description: Top Secret/SCI cleared. Extremely high barrier to competitor entry.
Gotham/Foundry deeply integrated into customer data infrastructure.
AIP bootcamps rapidly expanding enterprise customer base.

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data cloud platform. Enterprise analytics competition

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Azure AI targeting government and enterprise markets

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Much smaller scale vs PLTR

risks.title: P/E 229x — Extreme Overvaluation
risks.description: Even Forward P/E 78.45x is far above market average. Sharp multiple compression risk if growth slows.

risks.title: Prolonged Geopolitical Conflict → Recession Risk
risks.description: If Iran conflict persists, inflation reignites → rate hikes → recession. All growth stocks at risk.

risks.title: 52-Week High -29% — Trend Reversal Unconfirmed
risks.description: Still below 50-day MA $160. Technical downtrend not fully reversed.

risks.description: Executive share sales ongoing. Negative signal to market.

risks.description: Large cloud/data companies aggressively entering AI analytics market.

buyReasons.title: Defense AI Beneficiary — Iran War as Catalyst
buyReasons.rationale: Middle East escalation accelerates defense AI spending. Gotham/Maven direct beneficiaries. Outperformed during market sell-off.

buyReasons.title: EPS Consensus Sharply Rising
buyReasons.rationale: 2026/2027 EPS raised significantly over past month. Earnings momentum accelerating.

buyReasons.title: US Commercial +137% — AIP Platform Effect
buyReasons.rationale: High bootcamp conversion rates. Commercial revenue diversifying away from government dependence.

buyReasons.title: 29% Correction from 52-Week High
buyReasons.rationale: $207 → $147. Forward P/E 78x entry point for high-growth AI platform.

overallOpinion: Mar 3 close $147.23 (+1.42%). Outperformed market amid Iran-Israel conflict on defense AI expectations. Forbes positively assessed $350B market cap sustainability.
12 of 19 Buy. Consensus $185.82 (+26%). AIP commercial +137% accelerating. P/E 229x is a concern but converging to Forward P/E 78x.
$147.23, above 200-day $137, below 50-day $160. RSI 52 neutral. Defense AI budget expansion from geopolitical tensions could provide additional upside momentum.
